ab: Maku-aq haip a diqanin?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: Kamamakazhav a diqanin a, asa tu maqasmav quu danumbaqis.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: Maku-aq haip a diqanin?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Kamamaklang a diqanin a, asa tu ququu danum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Maku-aq haan nata ka diqanin?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Madaing a vali ka, asa mananulu tu biaq is pasanvali-un.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Maku-aq haan nata ka diqanin?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Madia ka luhum a, uka vali sadu-an.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: Maku-aq diqanin is kutun in?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Na uka vali kis kutun in i, madia ka luhum a, madaing amin a luvluv a.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Maku-aq diqanin tu tudiip?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: Makazhavkazhav haip diqanin a, asa menuk panhapavun tu hulus is munnata.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: Maku-aq diqanin tu mal-uu tu tudiip a?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Masihal a diqanin tu mal-uu tu tudiip.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: Na qudanan is tudiip in?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Na masihal tudiip a diqanin, na ni-i tu qudanan.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: Na qudanan is tudiip in?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Uu, na qudanan is tudiip in.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: Qudanan in?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Isdangza in, minsuma in a vali.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: Qudanan in?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Qudanan in, ni-i saak minadas i talulung.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: Qudanan nata ka?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: Ni-i in qudanan lopa ka dau, na qudanan is tonquvali in, asa madas i talulung is munnata.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: Na makazhav is pungna in tu qamisan?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Na makazhav is pungna in tu qamisan, asa panmadia hulus is menuk.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: Na maklang haip is talabal in tu diqanin?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Uu, asa maqasmav is quu danum i maklang is talabal in tu tudiip.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: Mazima asu kis namintalabal in?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: Mazima saak is namintalabal in, mopa mananqat a diqanin a.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: Mazima asu kis naminqamisan in?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: Ni-i saak mazima namimqamisan in tu diqanin, mopa madia balivusan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
